Query.SQL: SELECT AEA.AE_NUMBER AS "AEA.AE_NUMBER", AEA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AEA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AEA WHERE AEA.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber}

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE.AE_NUMBER AS "AE.AE_NUMBER" , AE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER AS "AE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER" , AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE.DATE_ENTERED AS "AE.DATE_ENTERED" , AE.DETAILS AS "AE.DETAILS" , AE.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "AE.ERROR_INDICATOR" , AE.EVENT_DATE AS "AE.EVENT_DATE" , AE.ISSUE_STAGE AS "AE.ISSUE_STAGE" , AE.PROCESS_DATE AS "AE.PROCESS_DATE" , AE.SERVICE_DATE AS "AE.SERVICE_DATE" , AE.SERVICE_STATUS AS "AE.SERVICE_STATUS" , AE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "AE.STD_EVENT_ID" , AE.USERNAME AS "AE.USERNAME" , SE.CATEGORY AS "SE.CATEGORY" , SE.DESCRIPTION AS "SE.DESCRIPTION" , SE.EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE.EDIT_DETAILS" , '0' AS "STATUS" , (CASE WHEN SE.CATEGORY IN (SELECT REF2.RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF2 WHERE REF2.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_EVENT_CATEGORY') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS "REF2.OBSOLETE" , AE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_EVENTS AE , STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${AEA.AE_NUMBER} AND AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ = ${param.caseEventSeq} AND SE.EVENT_ID = AE.STD_EVENT_ID

( SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , 'WP' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , WO.FINAL_IND AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , TO_CHAR(WO.OUTPUT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , 'Word Processing Output' AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(WO.XMLSOURCE) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" FROM WP_OUTPUT WO, AE_EVENTS AE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ = ${param.caseEventSeq} AND WO.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AND WO.OUTPUT_ID = (SELECT MAX(WO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WO2 WHERE WO2.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ) ) UNION ( SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , 'OR' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , 'Y' AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , RO.ORDER_ID AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , TO_CHAR(RO.REPORT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(RQ.DOCUMENT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" FROM REPORT_OUTPUT RO , REPORT_QUEUE RQ , AE_EVENTS AE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ = ${param.caseEventSeq} AND RO.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AND RQ.ID = RO.REPORT_ID )
